ai_assistance: not used for outcome selection or gate changes
baseline_control_summary: Candidate was compared with persistence, seasonal, meteorological anomaly, shuffled, reversed and no-solar-context controls under the frozen gate.
claim_boundary: NASA POWER D-103 passed the frozen gate only for the documented source, period, target, candidate, controls and acceptance rule.
known_limitations: Single domain and one frozen task only.
Daily NASA POWER data product only.
No operational deployment claim is made.
No broad model comparison is made.
manual_review: source boundary and claim boundary reviewed by maintainer
runner_command: uv run python scripts/claimbound_run_nasa_power_prereg.py --point POWER_A --point POWER_B --point POWER_C --json <local NASA POWER JSON files> --report artifacts/nasa_power_d103_real_run_summary.json
source_rights_note: Official public source. Raw payloads are not committed.
